title: Inventory SLR projection and coastal exposure data sources for SIDS
outcome: A dated source inventory separating SLR projections, elevation data, population data, storm-surge models, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, vertical accuracy, scenario coverage, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Map coastal exposure under multiple SLR scenarios for at least two SIDS
outcome: A reproducible island-scale coastal exposure map showing population and infrastructure within inundation zones under SSP2-4.5 and SSP5-8.5 scenarios for 2050 and 2100 timeframes.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with exposure mapping specification.
validation_method: Replicator reruns exposure mapping with alternative DEM and confirms inundation area and population estimates within reported uncertainty.
done_condition: Exposure maps include multiple SLR scenarios, vertical-accuracy uncertainty bounds, and explicit population-at-risk error ranges with replication confirmed.

title: Analyze compound risk from SLR, storm surge, and coastal erosion
outcome: A compound-risk analysis combining SLR inundation, storm-surge return-period shifts, and coastal erosion trends to identify highest-risk coastal zones.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with compound-risk analysis methodology and results.
validation_method: Replicator reruns compound-risk analysis with alternative extreme-value methods and confirms high-risk zone ranking robustness.
done_condition: Compound-risk analysis includes SLR, storm surge, and erosion components with explicit interaction assumptions and replication confirmed.

title: Develop adaptation prioritization framework for island-scale decisions
outcome: A framework for ranking adaptation options under deep SLR uncertainty, explicitly handling projection uncertainty, fiscal constraints, and SIDS governance capacity.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and playbooks.md update with adaptation framework.
validation_method: Replicator confirms framework includes explicit uncertainty handling, is not presented as an investment recommendation, and avoids forced-relocation language.
done_condition: Framework includes explicit deep-uncertainty methods, non-investment-recommendation caveats, and SIDS-specific governance constraints with replication confirmed.

title: Red-team maladaptation and over-precise projection risks
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying where over-precise SLR projections, exposure maps, or adaptation frameworks could cause maladaptation, forced relocation, or harmful policy.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every adaptation or exposure claim is either qualified with deep-uncertainty language, softened to analytic language, or gated behind replicated field-reality review.

title: Check whether outputs match SIDS adaptation planning decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether coastal exposure and adaptation outputs would change any real adaptation planning decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit safeguards against forced-relocation interpretations, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
